channel.title: Comments on: Anchor Steam – Merry Christmas & Happy New Year 2010, Ep. 119
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Scooter Hendon
item.dc:creator: Scooter Hendon
item.description: John so sexy in that shirt, chicks dig the belly.
item.content:encoded: John so sexy in that shirt, chicks dig the belly.

item.title: By: Bobby
item.dc:creator: Bobby
item.description: The new advertisements I'm seeing are a very good thing. Means people are paying attention! Great job Paul!
item.content:encoded: The new advertisements I’m seeing are a very good thing. Means people are paying attention! Great job Paul!

item.title: By: Dave Porter
item.dc:creator: Dave Porter
item.description: Paul, I like your presentation which is on the Lite side with a little Bouquet and I will give you a heads up on the fun meter. I'm not sure how the dark heavy stuff would mix with my meds and most of my previous beer drinking was done while hopping off to the Point in the summer.
item.content:encoded: Paul, I like your presentation which is on the Lite side with a little Bouquet and I will give you a heads up on the fun meter. I’m not sure how the dark heavy stuff would mix with my meds and most of my previous beer drinking was done while hopping off to the Point in the summer.

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
I agree with Scott's "I cant wait till you guys do your 2010 favorite beer of the year episode."
BTW where was this episode taped? And what's with the constant beep I hear, sounds like your in a Hospital hehe.
Anyway, great show as usual, keep it up and we'll keep watching!
Cheers, Marco
item.content:encoded:
I agree with Scott’s “I cant wait till you guys do your 2010 favorite beer of the year episode.”

BTW where was this episode taped? And what’s with the constant beep I hear, sounds like your in a Hospital hehe.

Anyway, great show as usual, keep it up and we’ll keep watching!

Cheers,
Marco

item.title: By: TucsonTom
item.dc:creator: TucsonTom
item.description:
A great video on a wonderful winter beer. I got a real lick out of watching John's face as he took that first sip. You could see that this beer's flavors were driving him nuts (in a good way, of course).
I'm tasting many winter seasonals this year, and Anchor's is by FAR my favorite. It has fantastic winter spicing with a great malt backbone. I don't know if anyone else has noticed, but many of this year's U.S. winter ales have a large dose of Pacific Northwest high-alpha hops. Now, I love hoppy beers more than most folks, but I'm finding a lot of same-ness in this season's U.S. winter beers because of all this hoppiness.
This year's Anchor release, though, sits all by itself, away from this season's crowd. It is fantastic.
item.content:encoded:
A great video on a wonderful winter beer. I got a real lick out of watching John’s face as he took that first sip. You could see that this beer’s flavors were driving him nuts (in a good way, of course).

I’m tasting many winter seasonals this year, and Anchor’s is by FAR my favorite. It has fantastic winter spicing with a great malt backbone. I don’t know if anyone else has noticed, but many of this year’s U.S. winter ales have a large dose of Pacific Northwest high-alpha hops. Now, I love hoppy beers more than most folks, but I’m finding a lot of same-ness in this season’s U.S. winter beers because of all this hoppiness.

This year’s Anchor release, though, sits all by itself, away from this season’s crowd. It is fantastic.

item.title: By: Scott
item.dc:creator: Scott
item.description:
Great video guys! I purchased this beer a week ago and its the first year for me and im looking forward to collecting one from each year forward.
I really enjoyed this beer, i tasted mint.
I cant wait till you guys do your 2010 favorite beer of the year episode. Keep the videos coming.
item.content:encoded:
Great video guys! I purchased this beer a week ago and its the first year for me and im looking forward to collecting one from each year forward.

I really enjoyed this beer, i tasted mint.

I cant wait till you guys do your 2010 favorite beer of the year episode. Keep the videos coming.
